name: Meeting Next Steps Extractor
description: Pull today's calendar events and Drive transcripts, use Claude AI to extract action items and next steps, and post a structured summary to Slack. Automates post-meeting follow-up.

source.originalName: Actioning your meeting next steps using transcripts and AI

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the meeting next steps

transcriptFolderQuery.description: Google Drive query to find transcript files

steps.name: List transcript files from Google Drive
Build Claude AI prompt for action item extraction
